records.question: Which publishers based in MA and USA have an employee with last name Thomas and middle initial H, and published titles priced at 7.0 released on 1991-10-05 with exactly 111.0 in year-to-date sales?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT publishers.pub_id FROM publishers
JOIN employee ON publishers.pub_id = employee.pub_id
JOIN titles ON publishers.pub_id = titles.pub_id
WHERE publishers.state = 'MA' AND publishers.country = 'USA' AND employee.lname = 'Thomas' AND employee.minit = 'H' AND titles.price = 7.0 AND titles.pubdate = '1991-10-05 00:00:00.0' AND titles.ytd_sales = 111.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.pub_id
FROM publishers p
JOIN employee e ON p.pub_id = e.pub_id
JOIN titles t ON p.pub_id = t.pub_id
WHERE p.state = 'MA'
AND p.country = 'USA'
AND e.lname = 'Thomas'
AND e.minit = 'H'
AND t.price = 7.0
AND t.pubdate = '1991-10-05'
AND t.ytd_sales = 111.0

records.question: Which publishers named Algodata Infosystems are based in the USA with an employee named Schmitt, have titles where the advance is exactly 7000.0, and include pr_info containing "publisher 1389 in the pubs database. Algodata Infosystems is located in Berkeley"?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT publishers.pub_id FROM publishers
JOIN employee ON publishers.pub_id = employee.pub_id
JOIN pub_info ON publishers.pub_id = pub_info.pub_id
JOIN titles ON publishers.pub_id = titles.pub_id
WHERE titles.advance = 7000.0 AND publishers.pub_name = 'Algodata Infosystems' AND employee.lname = 'Schmitt' AND publishers.country = 'USA' AND pub_info.pr_info LIKE '%publisher 1389 in the pubs database. Algodata Infosystems is located in Berkeley%'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.pub_id
FROM publishers p
JOIN employee e ON p.pub_id = e.pub_id
JOIN titles t ON p.pub_id = t.pub_id
JOIN pub_info pi ON p.pub_id = pi.pub_id
WHERE p.pub_name = 'Algodata Infosystems'
  AND p.country = 'USA'
  AND e.lname = 'Schmitt'
  AND t.advance = 7000.0
  AND pi.pr_info LIKE '%publisher 1389 in the pubs database. Algodata Infosystems is located in Berkeley%'

records.question: Which publishers have employees hired on or before 1990-09-13 and also have related publishing info and titles?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT publishers.pub_id FROM publishers
JOIN employee ON publishers.pub_id = employee.pub_id
JOIN pub_info ON publishers.pub_id = pub_info.pub_id
JOIN titles ON publishers.pub_id = titles.pub_id
WHERE employee.hire_date <= '1990-09-13 00:00:00.0'

SELECT DISTINCT p.pub_id
FROM publishers p
INNER JOIN employee e ON p.pub_id = e.pub_id
INNER JOIN pub_info pi ON p.pub_id = pi.pub_id
INNER JOIN titles t ON p.pub_id = t.pub_id
WHERE e.hire_date <= '1990-09-13'

)

)

)

records.gold_sql:
SELECT publishers.pub_id FROM publishers
JOIN employee ON publishers.pub_id = employee.pub_id
JOIN pub_info ON publishers.pub_id = pub_info.pub_id
JOIN titles ON publishers.pub_id = titles.pub_id
WHERE titles.royalty = 16.0 AND titles.ytd_sales >= 8780.0 AND titles.title = 'But Is It User Friendly?' AND titles.price = 22.95 AND titles.advance = 7000.0 AND employee.job_lvl = 87 AND employee.fname = 'Aria'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.pub_id
FROM publishers p
JOIN employee e ON p.pub_id = e.pub_id
JOIN titles t ON p.pub_id = t.pub_id
WHERE e.fname = 'Aria'
  AND e.job_lvl = 87
  AND t.title = 'But Is It User Friendly?'
  AND t.price = 22.95
  AND t.advance = 7000.0
  AND t.royalty = 16.0
  AND t.ytd_sales >= 8780.0

records.question: Which publishers named Lucerne Publishing are based in France and have employees with the middle initial J hired on or before 1994-03-11 who work as Acquisitions Managers at level 175 or lower?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT publishers.pub_id FROM publishers
JOIN employee ON publishers.pub_id = employee.pub_id
JOIN jobs ON employee.job_id = jobs.job_id
WHERE jobs.job_desc = 'Acquisitions Manager' AND employee.minit = 'J' AND jobs.max_lvl <= 175 AND employee.hire_date <= '1994-03-11 00:00:00.0' AND publishers.country = 'France' AND publishers.pub_name = 'Lucerne Publishing'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.pub_id
FROM publishers p
JOIN employee e ON p.pub_id = e.pub_id
JOIN jobs j ON e.job_id = j.job_id
WHERE p.pub_name = 'Lucerne Publishing'
  AND p.country = 'France'
  AND e.minit = 'J'
  AND e.hire_date <= '1994-03-11'
  AND j.job_desc = 'Acquisitions Manager'
  AND e.job_lvl <= 175

records.pred_sql:

records.question: Which publishers have the name exactly "Binnet & Hardley", are located exactly in the city "Washington", and also have related employee and pub_info records?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT publishers.pub_id FROM publishers
JOIN employee ON publishers.pub_id = employee.pub_id
JOIN pub_info ON publishers.pub_id = pub_info.pub_id
WHERE publishers.pub_name = 'Binnet & Hardley' AND publishers.city = 'Washington'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.pub_id
FROM publishers p
INNER JOIN employee e ON p.pub_id = e.pub_id
INNER JOIN pub_info pi ON p.pub_id = pi.pub_id
WHERE p.pub_name = 'Binnet & Hardley'
  AND p.city = 'Washington'

records.question: Which publishers have related employee records with a job level of at least 64 and also have related pub_info and titles records?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT publishers.pub_id FROM publishers
JOIN employee ON publishers.pub_id = employee.pub_id
JOIN pub_info ON publishers.pub_id = pub_info.pub_id
JOIN titles ON publishers.pub_id = titles.pub_id
WHERE employee.job_lvl >= 64
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.pub_id
FROM publishers p
INNER JOIN employee e ON p.pub_id = e.pub_id
INNER JOIN pub_info pi ON p.pub_id = pi.pub_id
INNER JOIN titles t ON p.pub_id = t.pub_id
WHERE e.job_lvl >= 64

records.question: Which publishers have an employee named Martine Rance who was hired on or before 1992-02-05?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT publishers.pub_id FROM publishers
JOIN employee ON publishers.pub_id = employee.pub_id
WHERE employee.lname = 'Rance' AND employee.hire_date <= '1992-02-05 00:00:00.0' AND employee.fname = 'Martine'

JOIN employee e ON p.pub_id = e.pub_id
WHERE e.fname = 'Martine'

  AND e.hire_date <= '1992-02-05'

records.question: Which publishers have titles with an advance exactly 8000.0 and price exactly 20.0, published on or after 1994-06-12, with royalties at most 10.0 and year-to-date sales at least 4095?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT publishers.pub_id FROM publishers
JOIN pub_info ON publishers.pub_id = pub_info.pub_id
JOIN titles ON publishers.pub_id = titles.pub_id
WHERE titles.advance = 8000.0 AND titles.price = 20.0 AND titles.pubdate >= '1994-06-12 00:00:00.0' AND titles.royalty <= 10.0 AND titles.ytd_sales >= 4095.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.pub_id
FROM publishers p
JOIN titles t ON p.pub_id = t.pub_id
WHERE t.advance = 8000.0
  AND t.price = 20.0
  AND t.pubdate >= '1994-06-12'
  AND t.royalty <= 10.0
  AND t.ytd_sales >= 4095

records.question: Which publishers named Algodata Infosystems in the USA have popular_comp titles with at least 10.0 royalty, exactly 4095.0 year-to-date sales, and published on or before 1994-06-12?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT publishers.pub_id FROM publishers
JOIN titles ON publishers.pub_id = titles.pub_id
WHERE titles.royalty >= 10.0 AND titles.pubdate <= '1994-06-12 00:00:00.0' AND titles.type = 'popular_comp' AND titles.ytd_sales = 4095.0 AND publishers.pub_name = 'Algodata Infosystems' AND publishers.country = 'USA'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.pub_id
FROM publishers p
JOIN titles t ON p.pub_id = t.pub_id
WHERE p.pub_name = 'Algodata Infosystems'
  AND p.country = 'USA'
  AND t.type = 'popular_comp'
  AND t.royalty >= 10.0
  AND t.ytd_sales = 4095.0
  AND t.pubdate <= '1994-06-12'

records.question: What publishers named Algodata Infosystems are located in Berkeley, CA, have pub_info containing 'publisher 1389 in the pubs database. Algodata Infosystems is located in Berkeley', and employ someone with last name Latimer at job level 32 or higher?

JOIN employee ON publishers.pub_id = employee.pub_id
JOIN pub_info ON publishers.pub_id = pub_info.pub_id
WHERE publishers.city = 'Berkeley' AND employee.job_lvl >= 32 AND employee.lname = 'Latimer' AND publishers.pub_name = 'Algodata Infosystems' AND pub_info.pr_info LIKE '%publisher 1389 in the pubs database. Algodata Infosystems is located in Berkeley%' AND publishers.state = 'CA'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.pub_id
FROM publishers p
JOIN pub_info pi ON p.pub_id = pi.pub_id
JOIN employee e ON p.pub_id = e.pub_id
WHERE p.pub_name = 'Algodata Infosystems'
  AND p.city = 'Berkeley'
  AND p.state = 'CA'
  AND pi.pr_info LIKE '%publisher 1389 in the pubs database. Algodata Infosystems is located in Berkeley%'
  AND e.lname = 'Latimer'
  AND e.job_lvl >= 32
